subTitle: High-performance, cross-platform mobile applications for iOS and Android, built with React Native and featuring robust full-stack integrations.

apps.title: Full-Stack E-commerce Mobile Solution - Final Year Project
apps.description: A premium cross-platform e-commerce mobile application developed as a university Final Year Project for the sanitary and hardware industry. The platform provides a complete digital shopping experience with secure payments, real-time inventory management, order tracking, and admin management features.
descriptionPoints: Developed as a university Final Year Project focused on modern e-commerce solutions.
Architected a high-performance cross-platform mobile application using React Native.
Designed specifically for sanitary and hardware product management and online sales.
Integrated secure Stripe payment gateway for smooth and reliable online transactions.
Implemented dynamic cart management with real-time backend synchronization.
Developed secure user authentication and profile management using Firebase and Node.js.
Built a complete admin dashboard for order management, inventory tracking, and analytics.
Engineered a scalable backend architecture using Node.js, Express.js, and MySQL.
Integrated Firebase Storage for efficient product image and media handling.
Optimized the UI/UX for responsive mobile shopping experiences across Android and iOS.

apps.title: Tap & Win - Multiplayer Real-Time Learning Game
apps.description: Tap & Win is an interactive multiplayer real-time mobile game developed with React Native, designed for entertainment, engagement, and learning-based activities. The app features live gameplay mechanics, animated reward systems, mobile wallet integration, and real-time socket communication to deliver a fun and competitive user experience.
descriptionPoints: Developed a multiplayer real-time game system with live Socket.io communication.
Designed interactive gameplay mechanics focused on entertainment, competition, and learning engagement.
Integrated smooth high-performance animations using React Native Reanimated.
Implemented live player activity updates, winner announcements, and real-time game synchronization.
Integrated EasyPaisa, JazzCash, and Stripe payment systems for secure wallet transactions.
Built a scalable backend architecture using Node.js, Express.js, and MySQL for high concurrency support.
Created transparent reward tracking, player history, and leaderboard management systems.
Optimized the mobile-first UI/UX for engaging gameplay and responsive interactions.
Implemented secure user authentication and anti-fraud game logic protections.
Designed the platform to support scalable multiplayer events and future gamification features.

apps.title: ElectroPak - Final Year Project
apps.description: ElectroPak is a smart electronics ecosystem mobile application developed as a university Final Year Project. The platform combines electrical products e-commerce, on-demand electrician service booking, wallet integration, and a reward-based engagement system into a complete digital solution.
descriptionPoints: Developed as a university Final Year Project focused on smart electrical service and e-commerce solutions.
Designed a complete ecosystem combining electrical product shopping and electrician service booking.
Integrated real-time electrician discovery and booking system with geolocation support.
Built a secure wallet and payment management system supporting multiple transaction workflows.
Developed separate user, electrician, and admin management panels for full operational control.
Implemented a reward-based engagement and gamification system to improve user retention.
Engineered a scalable full-stack backend architecture using Node.js, Express.js, and MySQL.
Created a modern mobile-first React Native UI/UX optimized for smooth user experience.
Added real-time booking updates, order management, and service tracking functionality.
Designed as a practical real-world startup solution with strong commercial potential.

apps.title: Mechify - Final Year Project
apps.description: Mechify is a smart automotive service mobile application developed as a Final Year Project for university students. The platform combines car spare parts e-commerce with real-time mechanic discovery and emergency roadside assistance using live location tracking and service booking features.
descriptionPoints: Developed as a university Final Year Project focused on smart automotive service solutions.
Designed a dual-purpose platform combining spare parts e-commerce with mechanic service booking.
Integrated Google Maps API for live technician discovery, route navigation, and real-time tracking.
Built an emergency roadside assistance workflow for quick mechanic availability.
Implemented secure booking, order management, and real-time service status update systems.
Developed a scalable full-stack backend architecture using Node.js, Express.js, and MySQL.
Created separate user and technician management workflows for complete service operations.
Optimized the mobile-first React Native UI/UX for smooth performance and usability.
Added cart management and automotive product purchasing functionality.
Designed as a practical real-world solution with strong commercial and startup potential.

apps.title: BK SCANNER - BookKru Event Scanner App
apps.description: BK SCANNER is a professional ticket scanning and event management mobile application developed for BookKru, an online ticket booking and event management platform. The app enables fast QR/barcode ticket verification, real-time attendee tracking, offline local server support, and seamless cloud synchronization for smooth event operations.
descriptionPoints: Developed for BookKru event operations and online ticket management system.
Secure staff and admin authentication system for controlled event access.
Fast QR code and barcode ticket scanning with real-time validation.
Live attendee entry tracking and ticket verification management.
Offline local server backend support for venues with internet connectivity issues.
Automatic cloud synchronization between offline and online event data.
Duplicate ticket detection system for secure and fraud-free event entry.
Real-time attendee data storage and scan history management.
Multi-device scanning support optimized for high-traffic event environments.
Scalable React Native architecture designed for modern event management infrastructure.

apps.title: PicNova-AI Image Generator(Play Store)
apps.description: PicNova is a newly launched AI-powered photo editing mobile application on the Google Play Store, built with React Native and featuring AI face enhancement, old photo restoration, AI avatar generation, secure authentication, push notifications, AdMob monetization, and a premium modern UI/UX optimized for Android devices.
descriptionPoints: Secure authentication system with Email Login, Signup, and Google Sign-In integration.
Modern premium UI/UX with smooth mobile-first responsive design and animations.
AI face enhancement, image upscaling, and photo quality improvement tools.
Old photo restoration and black & white image colorization features.
AI avatar generation with multiple creative and professional styles.
Real-time push notifications and local system notification support.
Integrated AdMob monetization system with rewarded and banner ads.
Feature preview screens with sample images and reusable enhancement modal system.
Optimized React Native + Expo architecture for high performance on Android devices.
Scalable full-stack ready structure designed for Play Store production deployment.
